cnst2kk.construction: Time varying constant term. See text.

INS.name: INS

KD.name: KD
KD.construction: Def., Eq. 58. Base Period=1952.1, Value=228.1, Dep. Rate=DELD

KH.name: KH

KK.name: KK

KKM.name: KKM

L3.name: L3

LAM.name: LAM
LAM.description: Amount of output capable of being produced per worker hour.
LAM.construction: Computed from peak to peak interpolation of logY/(JF · HF). Peak quarters are 1955.2, 1963.3, 1966.1, 1973.1, 1992.4, and 2010.4.

LM.name: LM
LM.description: Number of “monoliths”: difference between the total number of jobs (establishment data) and the total number of people employed (household survey data), millions.

M1.name: M1
M1.description: Money supply, end of quarter, B$.

MB.name: MB
MB.description: Net demand deposits and currency, b, B$.
MB.construction: Def., Eq. 71. Also sum of -NIDDLCB1-NIDDLCB2-NIDDLCB3-NIDDLZ2+CDDCFS-CDDCCA. Base Period=1971.4, Value=-197.969

MDIF.name: MDIF
MDIF.description: Net increase in demand deposits and currency of banks in U.S. possessions plus change in demand deposits and currency of private nonbank financial institutions plus change in demand deposits and currency of federally sponsored credit agencies and mortgage pools minus mail float, U.S. government, B$.

MF.name: MF
MF.description: Demand deposits and currency, f, B$.
MF.construction: Sum of CDDCF+MAILFLT1+MAILFLT2+CDDCN+MAILFLT3, Base Period=1971.4, Value=84.075

MG.name: MG
MG.description: Demand deposits and currency, g, B$.
MG.construction: Sum of CDDCUS+CDDCCA-NIDDLRMA-NIDDLGMA-NIDDLCMA, Base Period=1971.4, Value=10.526

MGQ.name: MGQ
MGQ.description: Demand deposits and currency, g, B2017$.

MH.name: MH
MH.description: Demand deposits and currency, h, B$.
MH.construction: Sum of CDDCH1. Base Period=1971.4, Value=132.050

MHQ.name: MHQ
MHQ.description: Demand deposits and currency, h, B2017$.

MR.name: MR
MR.description: Demand deposits and currency, r, B$.
MR.construction: Sum of CDDCR. Base Period=1971.4, Value=12.725

MRQ.name: MRQ
MRQ.description: Demand deposits and currency, r, B2017$.

MS.name: MS
MS.description: Demand deposits and currency, s, B$.
MS.construction: Sum of CDDCS. Base Period=1971.4, Value=12.114

MSQ.name: MSQ
MSQ.description: Demand deposits and currency, s, B2017$.

MUH.name: MUH
MUH.description: Amount of output capable of being produced per unit of capital.

NICD.name: NICD

NNG.name: NNG
NNG.description: Net acquisition of nonproduced nonfinancial assets, g, B$.

NNH.name: NNH
NNH.description: Net acquisition of nonproduced nonfinancial assets, h, B$.

NNR.name: NNR
NNR.description: Net acquisition of nonproduced nonfinancial assets, r, B$.

NNS.name: NNS
NNS.description: Net acquisition of nonproduced nonfinancial assets, s, B$.

PCGDPR.name: PCGDPR
PCGDPR.description: Percentage change in GDPR, annual rate, percentage points.

PCM1.name: PCM1

POP3.name: POP3
POP3.description: Noninstitutional population of all others, 16+, millions.

PROD.name: PROD
PROD.description: Output per paid for worker hour ("productivity").

PS13.name: PS13
PS13.description: Ratio of gross product of g and s to total employee hours of g and s.

PUG.name: PUG
PUG.description: Purchases of goods and services, g, B$.

PUS.name: PUS
PUS.description: Purchases of goods and services, s, B$.

Q.name: Q

Q.construction: Sum of CGLDFXUS+CGLDFXMA-CSDRUS. Base Period=1971.4, Value=13.985

QQ.name: QQ
QQ.description: Gold and foreign exchange, g, B2017$.

RMA.name: RMA
RMA.description: After tax mortgage rate, percentage points.

RS.name: RS
RS.description: Three-month Treasury bill rate, percentage points.

RSA.name: RSA
RSA.description: After tax bill rate, percentage points.

SGP.name: SGP
SGP.description: NIPA surplus (+) or deficit (-), g, B$.

SHRPIE.name: SHRPIE
SHRPIE.description: Ratio of after tax profits to the wage bill net of employer social security taxes.

SIFG.name: SIFG
SIFG.description: Employer social insurance contributions, f to g, B$.

SIFS.name: SIFS
SIFS.description: Employer social insurance contributions, f to s, B$.

SSP.name: SSP
SSP.description: NIPA surplus (+) or deficit (-), s, B$.

STATP.name: STATP
STATP.description: Statistical discrepancy relating to the use of chain type prices in indices, B2017$.

SUBG.name: SUBG
SUBG.description: Subsidies less current surplus of government enterprises, g, B$.

SUBS.name: SUBS
SUBS.description: Subsidies less current surplus of government enterprises, s, B$.

TBL2.name: TBL2
TBL2.construction: Time varying time trend. See text.

TBG.name: TBG
TBG.description: Corporate profit taxes, b to g, B$.

TBGQ.name: TBGQ
TBGQ.description: Corporate profit taxes, b to g, B2017$.

TBS.name: TBS
TBS.description: Corporate profit taxes, b to s, B$.

TCG.name: TCG
TCG.description: Corporate profit tax receipts, g, B$.

TCS.name: TCS
TCS.description: Corporate profit tax receipts, s, B$.

TF1.name: TF1
TF1.description: Corporate profit tax payments, F1, B$.

TFG.name: TFG
TFG.description: Corporate profit taxes, f to g, B$.

TFS.name: TFS
TFS.description: Corporate profit taxes, f to s, B$.
TFS.short_name: Firm Profit Taxes To State Local

THETA2.name: THETA2
THETA2.description: Ratio of CDH to PCD . CD.

THETA3.name: THETA3
THETA3.description: Ratio of NICD to PCD . CD.

THG.name: THG
THG.description: Personal income taxes, h to g, B$.

THS.name: THS
THS.description: Personal income taxes, h to s, B$.

TRFG.name: TRFG
TRFG.description: Transfer payments, f to g, B$.

TRFH.name: TRFH
TRFH.description: Transfer payments, f to h, B$.

TRFR.name: TRFR
TRFR.description: Transfer payments, f to r, B$.

TRFS.name: TRFS
TRFS.description: Transfer payments, f to s, B$.

TRGH.name: TRGH
TRGH.description: Transfer payments (net), g to h, B$.

TRGHQ.name: TRGHQ
TRGHQ.description: Transfer payments (net), g to h, B2017$.

TRGR.name: TRGR
TRGR.description: Transfer payments (net), g to r, B$.

TRGS.name: TRGS
TRGS.description: Transfer payments, g to s, B$.

TRGSQ.name: TRGSQ
TRGSQ.description: Transfer payments, g to s, B2017$.

TRHR.name: TRHR
TRHR.description: Transfer payments, h to r, B$.

TRRS.name: TRRS
TRRS.description: Transfer payments, r to s, B$.

WA.name: WA
WA.description: After tax wage rate. (Includes supplements to wages and salaries except employer contributions for social insurance.)

WF.name: WF
WF.description: Average hourly earnings excluding overtime of workers in f. (Includes supplements to wages and salaries except employer contributions for social insurance.)

WG.name: WG
WG.description: Average hourly earnings of civilian workers in g. (Includes supplements to wages and salaries including employer contributions for social insurance.)

WH.name: WH
WH.description: Average hourly earnings excluding overtime of all workers. (Includes supplements to wages and salaries except employer contributions for social insurance.)

WM.name: WM
WM.description: Average hourly earnings of military workers. (Includes supplements to wages and salaries including employer contributions for social insurance.)

WR.name: WR
WR.description: Real wage rate of workers in f. (Includes supplements to wages and salaries except employer contributions for social insurance.)

WS.name: WS
WS.description: Average hourly earnings of workers in s. (Includes supplements to wages and salaries including employer contributions for social insurance.)

YS.name: YS
YS.construction: Computed from peak to peak interpolation of log Y. Peak quarters are 1953.2, 1966.1, 1973.2, 1999.4, 2006.4, and 2023.4.

CUR.name: CUR
CUR.construction: Sum of NILCMA. Base Period=1971.4, Value=53.521

JF.name: JF
JF.description: Number of jobs in the firm sector.

V.name: V
V.construction: Def., Eq. 117. Base Period=1996.4, Value=1781.1, Table 5.8.6A

1.label: Consumer expenditures: services
1.formula: cnst2cs, cnst, AG1, AG2, AG3, log(CS/POP)−1, log[YD/(POP · PH)], RSA, log(AA/POP)−1, D202013, D202014, RHO = 1

10.label: Price deflator for non farm sales

12.label: Stock of capital−f
12.formula: KK cnst2kk, cnst, log(KK/KKMIN)−1, Δlog KK−1, Δlog Y, Δlog Y−1, Δlog Y−2, Δlog Y−3, Δlog Y−4, Δlog Y−5, (CG−2 + CG−3 + CG−4)/(PX−2YS−2 + PX−3YS−3 + PX−4YS−4), D202014, D202020, D202013, D202014, D202011, D202012, D202013, D202014

28.label: Unemployment insurance benefits
28.formula: cnst, log UB_-1, log U, log WF, RHO = 1

33.label: (PX \cdot X - PEX \cdot EX + PIM \cdot IM)/(X - EX + IM) \
33.formula: (PX · X - PEX · EX + PIM · IM)/(X - EX + IM)

34.label: (PCS \cdot CS + PCN \cdot CN + PCD \cdot CD + PIH \cdot IHH)/(CS + CN + CD + IHH) \
34.formula: (PCS · CS + PCN · CN + PCD · CD + PIH · IHH)/(CS + CN + CD + IHH)

43.label: 100[(WF \cdot JF(HN + 1.5HO) + WG \cdot JG \cdot HG + WM \cdot JM \cdot HM + WS \cdot JS \cdot HS)/(JF(HN + 1.5HO) + JG \cdot HG + JM \cdot HM + JS \cdot HS)

56.label: Net interest payments, g to r

57.label: Net receipts of factor income from the rest of the world

60.label: Total real sales
60.formula: CS + CN + CD + IHH + IKF + EX - IM + COG + COS + IKH + IKB + IKG + IHF

61.label: Total nominal sales
61.formula: PCS · CS + PCN · CN + PCD · CD + PIH · IHH + PIK · IKF + PEX · EX - PIM · IM + PG · COG + PS · COS + PIK · (IKH + IKB + IKG) + PIH · IHFS

62.label: Average number of non overtime hours paid per job-f

64.label: Taxable income-h
64.formula: WF · JF(HN + 1.5HO) + WG · JG · HG + WM · JM · HM + WS · JS · HS + RNT + INTZ + INTF + INTG - INTGR + INTS + DF + DB + DR + DG + DS + TRFH - TRHR - SIGG - SISS

65.label: Financial saving-h
65.formula: YT - SIHG - SIHG - THG - THS - PCS · CS - PCN · CN - PCD · CD + TRGH + TRSH + UB + INS + NICD + CCH - CTH - PIH · IHH - CDH - PIK · IKH - NNH

66.label: Budget constraint-h; (determines AH)
66.formula: SH - Δ AH - Δ MH + CG - DISH

67.label: Capital consumption, F1
67.formula: DG(GPIK · IKF + PIK - 1 · IKF - 1 + PIK - 2 · IKF - 2 + PIK - 3 · IKF - 3) / 4

68.label: Before tax profits-f
68.formula: XX + PIV · IVF + SUBS + SUBG + USOTHER - WF · JF(HN + 1.5HO) - RNT - INTZ - INTF - TRFH - NICD - CCH + CDH - TRFS - CCS - TRFR - GSMA - GSGA - TRFG - CCG - SIFG - SIFS - GSNN - IVA - CCF1 - STAT + TTRRF - PIEB - IBTG - IBTS

69.label: Financial saving-f
69.formula: XX + SUBS + SUBG + PIEFFRET + USOTHER - WF · JF(HN + 1.5HO) - RNT - INTZ - INTF - TRFH - NICD - CCH + CDH - TRFS - CCS - TRFR - GSMA - GSGA - TRFG - CCG - SIFG - SIFS - STAT - DF - TF1 - PIK · IKF - PIH · IHF - NNF - CTF1 - CTNN + TTRRF - PIEB - IBTG - IBTS

70.label: Budget constraint-f; (determines AF)
70.formula: SF - Δ AF - Δ MF - DISF

71.label: Demand deposit identity; (determines MB)
71.formula: Δ MB + Δ MH + Δ MF + Δ MR + Δ MG + Δ MS - Δ CUR

73.label: Budget constraint-b; (determines AB)
73.formula: SB - Δ AB - Δ MB - Δ (BR - BO) - DISB

74.label: Financial saving-r
74.formula: -PEX · EX - USROW + PIM · IM + TFR + TRFR + TRHR + TRGR - CTR - NNR - TRRS - TRRG2 - TTRRF

75.label: Budget constraint-r; (determines AR)
75.formula: SR - Δ AR - Δ MR + Δ Q - DISR

76.label: Financial saving-g
76.formula: GSMA + GSCA + THG + IBTC + TBG + TFG + SIHG + SIFG - DG + TRFG - PG · COG - WG · JG · HG - WM · JM · HM - TRGH - UB - TRGR - TRGS - INTG - SUBG + CCG - INS - CTGMB - NNG - PIK · IKG + SIGG + CTGB

77.label: Budget constraint-g; (determines AG unless AG is exogenous)
77.formula: SG - Δ AG - Δ MG + Δ CUR + Δ (BR - BO) - Δ Q - DISG

78.label: Financial saving-s
78.formula: THS + IBTS + TBS + TFS + SHS + SIFS - DS + TRGS + TRFS - PS · COS - WS · JS · HS - TRSH - INTS - SUBS + CCS - CTS - NNS + SISS + TRRS

79.label: Budget constraint-s; (determines AS)
79.formula: SS - Δ AS - Δ MS - DISS

80.label: Redundant equation—for checking
80.formula: SH + SF + SB + SR + SG + SS + STAT + TRRG2

81.label: Money supply
81.formula: M1 - 1 + Δ MH + Δ MF + Δ MR + Δ MS + MDIF

82.label: Nominal GDP
82.formula: XX + PIV(V - V - 1) + WG · JG · HG + WM · JM · HM + WS · JS · HS

83.label: Real GDP
83.formula: Y + PSI13(JG · HG + JM · HM + JS · HS) + STATP

93.label: Amount of capital required to produce Y

94.label: Number of worker hours required to produce Y

96.label: Capital expenditures, consumer durable goods, h

97.label: Net investment in consumer durables, h

103.label: Total social insurance contributions to g

104.label: Purchases of goods and services-g
104.formula: PG · COG + WG · JG · HG + WM · JM · HM

105.label: Net receipts-g
105.formula: THG + TCG + IBTG + SIG + TRFG - DG

106.label: Net expenditures-g
106.formula: PUG + TRGH + TRGR + TRGS + INTG + SUBG - IGZ + UB

109.label: Total social insurance contributions to s

112.label: Net receipts-s
112.formula: THS + TCS + IBTS + SIS + TRGS + TRFS - DS

115.label: Disposable income-h
115.formula: WF · JF(HN + 1.5HO) + WG · JG · HG + WM · JM · HM + WS · JS · HS + RNT + INTZ + INTF + INTG - INTGR + INTS + DF + DB + DR + DG + DS + TRFH + TRGH + TRSH + UB - SIHG - SIH - THG - THS - TRHR - SIGG - SISS

116.label: Approximate NIPA saving rate-h
116.formula: (YD - PCS · CS - PCN · CN - PCD · CD)/YD

118.label: Output per paid for worker hour:"productivity"

119.label: Real wage rate of workers in f
